summary: Made a surgical seam pass to tighten the Chapter 8 to Chapter 9 entry, align the building-cooling references with canon, and sharpen the late-chapter handoff into Noor carrying Suki's counting and analysis alone.
edits: Anchored the opening to Marcus's dock/mechanical sketch so the chapter enters directly from Chapter 8's final state.
Normalized the temperature-drop references to the canonical half-degree pattern instead of the larger daily drop.
Removed an internal body-count phrasing that implied knowledge Noor did not yet have at that moment.
Adjusted the Stairwell B count line so Noor's counting now reads as inherited burden, supporting the next chapter's transition.
